title: DocumentFrontmatter
description: Schema for JSON frontmatter in Markdown knowledge base documents. Validated against every .md file under data/. Frontmatter is delimited by ---json and --- for gray-matter compatibility.

$schema.description: Must reference this schema's canonical URL.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Bumped on breaking changes.

id.description: UUID of this document. Assigned by pre-build, never changes.

name.description: Human-readable name. Used as the display title and as the resolution target for NameIdReference lookups in object-name-space.

container.description: Reference to the parent directory. Null only for the root data/_index.md.

visibility.description: Access level. Effective visibility is the most restrictive value in the ancestor chain.

created.description: Date this document was first created.

modified.description: Date this document was last substantively modified.

aliases.description: Alternative names for this document. Case-sensitive free-form strings.

version.description: Semantic version of the document content, if applicable.

document_template.description: Identifier of a body template this document must conform to. Kebab-case. Template validation is a post-v1 feature; the field is reserved now.
